---
position: 4
title: AI frameworks
description: Building AI agents and agent rules with SurrealDB.
source: "https://github.com/surrealdb/docs.surrealdb.com/blob/main/src/content/build/ai-agents/ai-frameworks.mdx"
---

SurrealDB integrates with widely used AI and machine learning frameworks so you can use a single database for features, training or evaluation pipelines, and agent orchestration. Each integration page explains setup, typical patterns, and links to upstream documentation where helpful.

Available integrations:

- [Agno](../integrations/ai-frameworks/agno.md)
- [CAMEL](../integrations/ai-frameworks/camel.md)
- [CrewAI](../integrations/ai-frameworks/crewai.md)
- [Dagster](../integrations/ai-frameworks/dagster.md)
- [Google Agent Development Kit](../integrations/ai-frameworks/google-agent.md)
- [LangChain](../integrations/ai-frameworks/langchain.md)
- [LlamaIndex](../integrations/ai-frameworks/llamaindex.md)
- [PydanticAI](../integrations/ai-frameworks/pydantic-ai.md)
- [smolagents](../integrations/ai-frameworks/smolagents.md)

For a comparative table and links to deeper guides, start from the [AI frameworks overview](../integrations/ai-frameworks/overview.md).
